author: Mads Kristensen
releaseNotes:
v0.3.0: parseJson guard for blank search_coords + empty API bodies; API key help/docs now point to develop.purpleair.com; add pm2_5, temperature, humidity, and confidence attributes (confidence reports the lowest contributing sensor score in averaging mode).
v0.2.0: namespace → mads; emitIfChanged eliminates ~35,040 duplicate events/year; descriptionText on sites uses device.displayName; 1-min interval quota warning; sentinel .isNumber() guards on pm2.5 field; logsOff auto-disable; lastActivity (Pattern B); fix IQAir→PurpleAir log prefix.
v0.1.0: Initial fork from pfmiller0 v1.3.2; 3 Trinity audit fixes: AQ&U string mismatch, LRAPA/Woodsmoke case + wrong PM2.5 field, failCount operator-precedence breaking exponential backoff.
